prompt_order.title: TRUST_AWARE_REFUSAL_AND_CONTAINMENT_RECONCILIATION-0
human_review_requirements: receipt_and_provenance_reclassification FULL review if any shadow or parallel evidence is promoted toward canonical receipt truth
trust_root_governance_changes FULL review if any work implies trust-root promotion rotation revocation execution or publication execution
review_gated_refusal_or_containment_semantic_changes FULL review if refusal or containment drift into live trust convergence or operational authority
distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review if any work implies authority movement or cutover legality beyond the frozen scope
stop_conditions: stop if Ζ-B4 drifts into live trust revocation or publication execution
stop if Ζ-B4 reclassifies shadow or parallel receipt evidence without FULL review
stop if Ζ-B4 loosens first-wave freeze or later-wave single-family posture without checkpoint law
notes: This prompt is a final narrow reconciliation step, not a second later-wave family admission.
Outputs must remain review-gated and non-realizing while trust-sensitive blocker posture is narrowed.

prompt_order.title: POST_TRUST_AWARE_REFUSAL_AND_CONTAINMENT_REASSESSMENT-0
human_review_requirements: checkpoint must verify Ζ-B3 shadow or parallel evidence posture remained intact
checkpoint must verify no evidence reclassification toward canonical receipt truth occurred without FULL review
checkpoint must verify Ζ-B4 did not widen into trust execution, publication execution, or authority transfer
stop_conditions: stop before any second later-wave family prompt until this checkpoint exists
notes: This checkpoint decides whether any second later-wave family can be reconsidered honestly after trust-sensitive narrowing.

stability.replacement_target: later post-Ζ-B4 next-order artifact may refine sequence without replacing the ordering law frozen here
